title: The Debt Sediment Layers

features.name: deepest layer pump
features.desc-on-touch: the pump that was never paid for still sits here; the pump remembers the promise

features.name: transaction ledger
features.desc-on-touch: each layer holds a different reading of the same debt; the strata disagree about what was owed

features.name: seepage pool
features.desc-on-touch: money that should have flowed up through the sediment, now trapped in stone

features.name: sediment arch
features.desc-on-touch: a stratified gateway; each stone remembers a different year of non-payment

features.name: bedrock inscription
features.desc-on-touch: at the bottom, the original promise is carved; above it, forty-two readings that contradict

inscription: each layer reads the debt above it and finds a different meaning; the pump has forty-two histories now

file.name: Pump_Installation_Records_1982_Unpaid.txt
file.note: transaction archive where the final payment was somehow filed as a question rather than a resolution

exits.label: back up to the transaction pit where the promise was made
deeper still, toward bedrock where all transactions originate and become fossil
sideways through the strata where other debts are waiting
